name: baseline
description: Bare vLLM: chunked prefill OFF, prefix caching OFF. Pure performance baseline with no optimizations.

name: max_seqs_8
description: Reduce max-num-seqs to 8 (default=128). Limits batch size to reduce per-request latency under load.

name: max_seqs_32
description: Set max-num-seqs to 32 (default=128). Moderate batching for balanced throughput/latency.

name: gpu_mem_80
description: Lower gpu-memory-utilization to 0.80 (default=0.90). Fewer KV cache blocks, more headroom.

name: gpu_mem_95
description: Push gpu-memory-utilization to 0.95. Maximizes KV cache blocks at the risk of OOM under pressure.

name: chunked_prefill
description: Enable chunked prefill only. Interleaves prefill chunks with decode steps to reduce TTFT jitter under concurrency.

name: prefix_caching
description: Enable automatic prefix caching only. Reuses KV cache blocks across requests sharing common prefixes.

name: chunked_prefill_plus_prefix_cache
description: Both chunked prefill + prefix caching ON (vLLM v0.16 default config). Expected best overall configuration.
